headline: How Executive Membership Momentum And New Partnerships At Costco (COST) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late June 2026, Costco Wholesale was added to several Russell value and defensive indexes, while partner Insta360 launched a Costco-exclusive Luna Ultra Bundle on Costco.com that enhances the appeal of its camera with extra accessories at no added cost. At the same time, Costco’s push into higher-value executive memberships and strong digital engagement is reshaping the quality of its member base, deepening recurring revenue from shoppers who increasingly interact with the retailer...

headline: Why Vanguard’s $143 Billion Tech ETF Outpaced QQQ While Charging Half the Fee
summary: A 45-year-old tech professional sitting on $200,000 in Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ:QQQ) for growth exposure has a fair question in 2026: why hold a Nasdaq-100 fund that includes Costco and Pepsi when a pure-tech alternative exists at half the cost? That alternative is Vanguard Information Technology ETF (NYSEARCA:VGT), a roughly $143 billion fund that has ... Why Vanguard’s $143 Billion Tech ETF Outpaced QQQ While Charging Half the Fee

headline: Better Buy: Target at an All-Time High or a 50/50 Split of Costco and Walmart?
summary: Target is about 50% below its all-time high but sells at a massive discount to its peers.

headline: Dave Ramsey warns on Costco habit that could cost $108,000
summary: Warehouse clubs like Costco are designed to help save consumers money. Buying in bulk can lower your cost per item, and the retailer is known for competitive prices on everything from groceries to electronics. Plus, the nice thing about buying Costco products is that the company stands behind ...
